001package com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.response.qualifyingEvent;
002
003import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.Message;
004import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.bluetooth.PumpStateSupplier;
005import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.builders.ControlIQInfoRequestBuilder;
006import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.builders.CurrentBatteryRequestBuilder;
007import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.builders.IOBRequestBuilder;
008import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.builders.LastBolusStatusRequestBuilder;
009import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.helpers.Bytes;
010import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.models.ApiVersion;
011import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.ActiveAamBitsRequest;
012import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.AlarmStatusRequest;
013import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.AlertStatusRequest;
014import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.BasalIQSettingsRequest;
015import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.BasalIQStatusRequest;
016import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.BasalLimitSettingsRequest;
017import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.BolusPermissionChangeReasonRequest;
018import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.CGMAlertStatusRequest;
019import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.CGMStatusRequest;
020import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.ControlIQSleepScheduleRequest;
021import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.CurrentBasalStatusRequest;
022import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.CurrentBolusStatusRequest;
023import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.CurrentEGVGuiDataRequest;
024import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.ExtendedBolusStatusRequest;
025import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.GlobalMaxBolusSettingsRequest;
026import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.HighestAamRequest;
027import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.HomeScreenMirrorRequest;
028import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.InsulinStatusRequest;
029import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.LastBGRequest;
030import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.LoadStatusRequest;
031import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.LocalizationRequest;
032import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.MalfunctionStatusRequest;
033import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.ProfileStatusRequest;
034import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.PumpGlobalsRequest;
035import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.PumpSettingsRequest;
036import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.ReminderStatusRequest;
037import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.TempRateRequest;
038import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.TimeSinceResetRequest;
039
040import org.json.JSONObject;
041
042import java.util.HashSet;
043import java.util.Set;
044import java.util.TreeSet;
045import java.util.function.Supplier;
046import java.util.stream.Collectors;
047
048/**
049 * A list of all QualifyingEvents which can be sent from the pump. For some events, a set of request
050 * messages which can be sent (via `sendPumpCommand`) to receive more information about the event
051 * which just occurred, in logic matching the Tandem mobile app, is included. To get these
052 * instantiated request messages, you can invoke:
053 *     QualifyingEvent.groupSuggestedHandlers(qualifyingEvents)
054 *
055 * Note that if t:connect app connection sharing is enabled and the t:connect app is running,
056 * you can use enableSendSharedConnectionResponseMessages and get the response from these callbacks
057 * for free, without duplicating requests.
058 */
059public enum QualifyingEvent {
060    ALERT(1, Set.of(
061            AlertStatusRequest::new)),
062    ALARM(2, Set.of(
063            AlarmStatusRequest::new,
064            HighestAamRequest::new,
065            () -> activeAamBitsRequest(2))),
066    REMINDER(4, Set.of(
067            ReminderStatusRequest::new)),
068    MALFUNCTION(8, Set.of(
069            MalfunctionStatusRequest::new,
070            HighestAamRequest::new,
071            () -> activeAamBitsRequest(4))),
072    CGM_ALERT(16, Set.of(
073            CGMAlertStatusRequest::new)),
074    HOME_SCREEN_CHANGE(32, Set.of(
075            CurrentBasalStatusRequest::new,
076            CurrentEGVGuiDataRequest::new,
077            HomeScreenMirrorRequest::new,
078            () -> ControlIQInfoRequestBuilder.create(PumpStateSupplier.pumpApiVersion.get()))),
079    PUMP_SUSPEND(64, Set.of(
080            InsulinStatusRequest::new,
081            () -> IOBRequestBuilder.create(PumpStateSupplier.controlIQSupported.get()))),
082    PUMP_RESUME(128, Set.of(
083            InsulinStatusRequest::new,
084            () -> IOBRequestBuilder.create(PumpStateSupplier.controlIQSupported.get()),
085            CurrentEGVGuiDataRequest::new,
086            ProfileStatusRequest::new)),
087    TIME_CHANGE(256, Set.of(
088            () -> IOBRequestBuilder.create(PumpStateSupplier.controlIQSupported.get()),
089            CGMStatusRequest::new,
090            TimeSinceResetRequest::new)),
091    BASAL_CHANGE(512, Set.of(
092            () -> IOBRequestBuilder.create(PumpStateSupplier.controlIQSupported.get()),
093            HomeScreenMirrorRequest::new,
094            CurrentBasalStatusRequest::new,
095            TempRateRequest::new)),
096    BOLUS_CHANGE(1024, Set.of(
097            CurrentBolusStatusRequest::new,
098            ExtendedBolusStatusRequest::new,
099            () -> LastBolusStatusRequestBuilder.create(PumpStateSupplier.pumpApiVersion.get()))),
100    IOB_CHANGE(2048, Set.of(
101            () -> IOBRequestBuilder.create(PumpStateSupplier.controlIQSupported.get()))),
102    EXTENDED_BOLUS_CHANGE(4096, Set.of(
103            ExtendedBolusStatusRequest::new,
104            () -> LastBolusStatusRequestBuilder.create(PumpStateSupplier.pumpApiVersion.get()))),
105    PROFILE_CHANGE(8192, Set.of(
106            ProfileStatusRequest::new)),
107    BG(16384, Set.of(
108            LastBGRequest::new)),
109    CGM_CHANGE(32768, Set.of(
110            CGMStatusRequest::new,
111            CurrentEGVGuiDataRequest::new,
112            HomeScreenMirrorRequest::new)),
113    BATTERY(65536, Set.of(
114            () -> CurrentBatteryRequestBuilder.create(PumpStateSupplier.pumpApiVersion.get()))),
115    BASAL_IQ(131072, Set.of(
116            BasalIQSettingsRequest::new)),
117    REMAINING_INSULIN(262144, Set.of(
118            InsulinStatusRequest::new)),
119    PUMP_COMMUNICATIONS_SUSPENDED(524288),
120    ACTIVE_PROFILE_SEGMENT_CHANGE(1048576, Set.of(
121            ProfileStatusRequest::new)),
122    BASAL_IQ_STATUS(2097152, Set.of(
123            BasalIQSettingsRequest::new,
124            BasalIQStatusRequest::new)),
125    CONTROL_IQ_INFO(4194304, Set.of(
126            () -> IOBRequestBuilder.create(PumpStateSupplier.controlIQSupported.get()),
127            () -> ControlIQInfoRequestBuilder.create(PumpStateSupplier.pumpApiVersion.get()),
128            ControlIQSleepScheduleRequest::new)),
129    CONTROL_IQ_SLEEP(8388608, Set.of(
130            ControlIQSleepScheduleRequest::new)),
131    GLOBAL_PUMP_SETTINGS(16777216, Set.of(
132            GlobalMaxBolusSettingsRequest::new,
133            BasalLimitSettingsRequest::new,
134            LocalizationRequest::new,
135            PumpGlobalsRequest::new,
136            PumpSettingsRequest::new)),
137    SNOOZE_STATUS(33554432),
138    PUMPING_STATUS(67108864, Set.of(
139            LoadStatusRequest::new)),
140    PUMP_RESET(134217728),
141    HEARTBEAT(268435456),
142    BOLUS_PERMISSION_REVOKED(2147483648L, Set.of(
143            () -> {
144                if (PumpStateSupplier.inProgressBolusId != null && PumpStateSupplier.inProgressBolusId.get() != null) {
145                    return new BolusPermissionChangeReasonRequest(PumpStateSupplier.inProgressBolusId.get());
146                }
147                return null;
148            }
149    )),
150
151    ;
152    private final long id;
153    private final Set<Supplier<? extends Message>> suggestedHandlers;
154    QualifyingEvent(long id) {
155        this.id = id;
156        this.suggestedHandlers = new HashSet<>();
157    }
158
159    QualifyingEvent(long id, Set<Supplier<? extends Message>> suggestedHandlers) {
160        this.id = id;
161        this.suggestedHandlers = suggestedHandlers;
162    }
163
164    public final long getId() {
165        return id;
166    }
167
168    public final Set<Supplier<? extends Message>> getSuggestedHandlers() {
169        return suggestedHandlers;
170    }
171
172    public static Set<QualifyingEvent> fromBitmask(long bitmask) {
173        Set<QualifyingEvent> ret = new TreeSet<>();
174        for (QualifyingEvent e : values()) {
175            if ((bitmask & e.getId()) != 0) {
176                ret.add(e);
177            }
178        }
179        return ret;
180    }
181
182    public static Set<QualifyingEvent> fromRawBtBytes(byte[] raw) {
183        return fromBitmask(Bytes.readUint32(raw, 0));
184    }
185
186    public static Set<? extends Message> groupSuggestedHandlers(Set<QualifyingEvent> events) {
187        ApiVersion apiVersion = null;
188        if (PumpStateSupplier.pumpApiVersion != null) {
189            apiVersion = PumpStateSupplier.pumpApiVersion.get();
190        }
191        return groupSuggestedHandlers(events, apiVersion);
192    }
193
194    public static Set<? extends Message> groupSuggestedHandlers(Set<QualifyingEvent> events, ApiVersion apiVersion) {
195        Set<Supplier<? extends Message>> messages = new HashSet<>();
196        for (QualifyingEvent e : events) {
197            messages.addAll(e.suggestedHandlers);
198        }
199        return messages.stream()
200                .map(Supplier::get)
201                .filter(message -> message != null && supportsApiVersion(message, apiVersion))
202                .collect(Collectors.toSet());
203    }
204
205    private static boolean supportsApiVersion(Message message, ApiVersion apiVersion) {
206        if (apiVersion == null) {
207            return true;
208        }
209
210        ApiVersion minApi = message.props().minApi().get();
211        return apiVersion.compareTo(minApi) >= 0;
212    }
213
214    public static int toBitmask(QualifyingEvent...states) {
215        int bitmask = 0;
216        for (QualifyingEvent e : states) {
217            bitmask |= e.getId();
218        }
219        return bitmask;
220    }
221
222    public String jsonToString() {
223        JSONObject obj = new JSONObject();
224        obj.put("event", name());
225        return obj.toString(0);
226    }
227
228    public JSONObject asJsonObject() {
229        JSONObject obj = new JSONObject();
230        obj.put("event", name());
231        return obj;
232    }
233
234    private static ActiveAamBitsRequest activeAamBitsRequest(int aamType) {
235        return new ActiveAamBitsRequest(new byte[]{(byte) aamType});
236    }
237
238}
